tracks.rawText: 3:43Steve Vai - ＂Tender Surrender＂ [Yw74sDWPH7U]v5.5CoverThe song fuses progressive and alternative metal with aggressive, syncopated riffs and abrupt time signature changes, Middle Eastern/Armenian scales color guitar leads and atmospheric passages, while percussive drumming alternates between pounding double-kick and folk-inspired rhythms, Dynamic shifts move from haunting, sparse verses to explosive, multi-layered choruses, featuring complex textures and angular bass lines, Distorted guitars intertwine with brief, dissonant oud or duduk flourishes for ethnic authenticityorbit1PublishRemix
